dashboard.label: Hitachi Block Storage LDEV, Pool & PG Performance Analytics
dashboard.description: Top LDEV performance trends (IOPS, response time, transfer rate, random/sequential IOPS, random/sequential transfer rate), Pool performance (IOPS, response time, transfer rate), and PG performance (utilization, IOPS read/write, transfer rate, read/write response time). All LDEV panels show Top 10 by average over the selected time range.
dashboard.definition: { "title": "Hitachi Block Storage LDEV, Pool & PG Performance Analytics", "description": "Top LDEV performance trends (IOPS, response time, transfer rate, random/sequential IOPS, random/sequential transfer rate), Pool performance (IOPS, response time, transfer rate), and PG performance (utilization, IOPS read/write, transfer rate, read/write response time). All LDEV panels show Top 10 by average over the selected time range.", "inputs": { "input_vsp360_host": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_populate_vsp360_host" }, "options": { "defaultValue": "*", "items": [ { "label": "All VSP 360 Hosts", "value": "*" } ], "token": "vsp360_host_tok" }, "title": "VSP 360 Host", "type": "input.dropdown" }, "input_storage_system": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_populate_storage_systems" }, "options": { "defaultValue": "*", "items": [ { "label": "All Serial Numbers", "value": "*" } ], "token": "storage_serial_tok" }, "title": "Storage Serial Number", "type": "input.dropdown" }, "input_time": { "options": { "defaultValue": "-24h@h,now", "token": "tr_time" }, "title": "Time Range", "type": "input.timerange" } }, "defaults": { "dataSources": {} }, "visualizations": { "viz_p1_label": { "options": { "content": "## LDEV IOPS — Top 10" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p1_total_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p1_total_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Total IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p1_read_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p1_read_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Read IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p1_write_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p1_write_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Write IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p2_label": { "options": { "content": "## LDEV Response Time — Top 10" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p2_resp": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p2_resp" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "ms" }, "title": "LDEV Response Time (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p2_read_resp": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p2_read_resp" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "ms" }, "title": "LDEV Read Response Time (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p2_write_resp": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p2_write_resp" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "ms" }, "title": "LDEV Write Response Time (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p3_label": { "options": { "content": "## LDEV Transfer Rate — Top 10 (MiB/s)" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p3_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p3_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "LDEV Transfer Rate (Top 10, MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p3_read_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p3_read_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "LDEV Read Transfer Rate (Top 10, MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p3_write_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p3_write_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "LDEV Write Transfer Rate (Top 10, MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4a_label": { "options": { "content": "## LDEV Random IOPS — Top 10" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p4a_random_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4a_random_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Random IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4a_random_read_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4a_random_read_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Random Read IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4a_random_write_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4a_random_write_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Random Write IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4b_label": { "options": { "content": "## LDEV Sequential IOPS — Top 10" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p4b_seq_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4b_seq_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Sequential IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4b_seq_read_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4b_seq_read_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Sequential Read IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4b_seq_write_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4b_seq_write_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "LDEV Sequential Write IOPS (Top 10)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4c_label": { "options": { "content": "## LDEV Random Transfer Rate — Top 10 (MiB/s)" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p4c_random_read_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4c_random_read_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "LDEV Random Read Transfer Rate (Top 10, MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4c_random_write_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4c_random_write_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "LDEV Random Write Transfer Rate (Top 10, MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4d_label": { "options": { "content": "## LDEV Sequential Transfer Rate — Top 10 (MiB/s)" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p4d_seq_read_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4d_seq_read_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "LDEV Sequential Read Transfer Rate (Top 10, MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p4d_seq_write_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p4d_seq_write_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "LDEV Sequential Write Transfer Rate (Top 10, MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p5_label": { "options": { "content": "## Pool IOPS" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p5_total_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p5_total_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "Pool Total IOPS", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p5_read_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p5_read_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "Pool Read IOPS", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p5_write_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p5_write_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "Pool Write IOPS", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p6_label": { "options": { "content": "## Pool Response Time" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p6_resp": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p6_resp" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "ms" }, "title": "Pool Response Time (ms)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p6_read_resp": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p6_read_resp" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "ms" }, "title": "Pool Read Response Time (ms)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p6_write_resp": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p6_write_resp" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "ms" }, "title": "Pool Write Response Time (ms)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p7_label": { "options": { "content": "## Pool Transfer Rate (MiB/s)" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p7_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p7_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "Pool Transfer Rate (MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p7_read_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p7_read_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "Pool Read Transfer Rate (MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p7_write_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p7_write_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#10B981", "#F59E0B", "#DC2626", "#1A56DB", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "Pool Write Transfer Rate (MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p8_label": { "options": { "content": "## Parity Group Utilization" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p8_util": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p8_util" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0.12, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "%" }, "title": "PG Utilization (%)", "type": "splunk.area" }, "viz_p9_label": { "options": { "content": "## Parity Group IOPS" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p9_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p9_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "PG Total IOPS", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p9_read_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p9_read_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "PG Read IOPS", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p9_write_iops": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p9_write_iops" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "IOPS" }, "title": "PG Write IOPS", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p10_xfer": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p10_xfer" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "MiB/s" }, "title": "PG Transfer Rate (MiB/s)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p11_label": { "options": { "content": "## Parity Group Response Time" }, "type": "splunk.markdown" }, "viz_p11_read_resp": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p11_read_resp" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "ms" }, "title": "PG Read Response Time (ms)", "type": "splunk.line" }, "viz_p11_write_resp": { "dataSources": { "primary": "ds_p11_write_resp" }, "options": { "areaOpacity": 0, "legendDisplay": "bottom", "lineWidth": 2, "nullValueDisplay": "zero", "seriesColors": [ "#1A56DB", "#DC2626", "#047857", "#D97706", "#7C3AED", "#0891B2", "#E11D48", "#84CC16", "#6366F1", "#F97316" ], "xAxisTitleVisibility": "hide", "yAxisAbbreviation": "off", "yAxisTitleText": "ms" }, "title": "PG Write Response Time (ms)", "type": "splunk.line" } }, "dataSources": { "ds_p1_total_iops": { "name": "p1_ldev_total_iops", "options": { "query": "index=\"hitachicsad\" sourcetype=\"hitachi:vspblock:perf\" resource_type=\"raidLdev\" metric_name=\"totalIOPS\" | where (storage_serial=\"$storage_serial_tok$\" OR \"$storage_serial_tok$\"=\"*\") | eval raw_value = value | eval panel_totalIOPS = round(tonumber(value), 2) | eval ldev_label = instance_id | eventstats avg(panel_totalIOPS) as avg_panel_totalIOPS by ldev_label | sort 0 - avg_panel_totalIOPS | timechart span=5m avg(panel_totalIOPS) by ldev_label limit=10 useother=false | fillnull value=0", "queryParameters": { "earliest": "$tr_time.earliest$", "latest": "$tr_time.latest$" } }, "type": "ds.search" }, "ds_p1_read_iops": { "name": "p1_ldev_read_iops", "options": { "query": "index=\"hitachicsad\" sourcetype=\"hitachi:vspblock:perf\" resource_type=\"raidLdev\" metric_name=\"readIOPS\" | where (storage_serial=\"$storage_serial_tok$\" OR \"$storage_serial_tok$\"=\"*\") | eval raw_value = value | eval panel_readIOPS = round(tonumber(value), 2) | eval ldev_label = instance_id | eventstats avg(panel_readIOPS) as avg_panel_readIOPS by ldev_label | sort 0 - avg_panel_readIOPS | timechart span=5m avg(panel_readIOPS) by ldev_label limit=10 useother=false | fillnull value=0", "queryParameters": { "earliest": "$tr_time.earliest$", "latest": "$tr_time.latest$" } }, "type": "ds.search" }, "ds_p1_write_iops": { "name": "p1_ldev_write_iops", "options": { "query": "index=\"hitachicsad\" sourcetype=\"hitachi:vspblock:perf\" resource_type=\"raidLdev\" metric_name=\"writeIOPS\" | where "type": "ds.search" }, "ds_populate_vsp360_host": { "name": "populate_vsp360_host", "options": { "query": "index=\"hitachicsad\" sourcetype=\"hitachi:vspblock:config\" resource_type=\"raidStorage\" | spath input=_raw path=vsp360_host output=vsp360_host | where isnotnull(vsp360_host) | dedup vsp360_host | table vsp360_host | rename vsp360_host as vsp360_host_tok | sort + vsp360_host_tok", "queryParameters": { "earliest": "-30d@d", "latest": "now" } }, "type": "ds.search" }, "ds_populate_storage_systems": { "name": "populate_storage_systems", "options": { "query": "index=\"hitachicsad\" sourcetype=\"hitachi:vspblock:config\" resource_type=\"raidStorage\" | spath input=_raw path=storage_serial output=ser | spath input=_raw path=storage_name output=arr_name | spath input=_raw path=modelName output=model | where isnotnull(ser) | dedup ser | eval label=arr_name.\" (\".ser.\")\" | table ser label | rename ser as storage_serial_tok | sort + label", "queryParameters": { "earliest": "-30d@d", "latest": "now" } }, "type": "ds.search" } }, "layout": { "globalInputs": [ "input_time", "input_storage_system", "input_vsp360_host" ], "layoutDefinitions": { "main_layout": { "options": { "display": "auto-scale", "height": 6075, "width": 1440 }, "structure": [ { "item": "viz_p1_label", "position": { "h": 40, "w": 500, "x": 10, "y": 0 }, "type": "block" }, { "item":
